name: Astrana Health, Inc.
summary: Astrana Health, Inc. (formerly Apollo Medical Holdings, Inc.) is a Delaware-based healthcare company operating through consolidated subsidiaries and affiliated entities, including Independent Practice Associations (IPAs), medical corporations, and management services organizations (MSOs). The company participates in value-based care programs including ACO REACH, Medicare Shared Savings Program (MSSP), and the ACO LEAD Model, and acquired certain businesses and assets of Prospect Medical Holdings, Inc.

products.name: ACO REACH Program
products.description: Participation in CMS ACO Realizing Equity, Access, and Community Health Model for value-based Medicare care.

products.name: Medicare Shared Savings Program (MSSP)
products.description: Participation in CMS Medicare Shared Savings Program for coordinated value-based care delivery.

products.name: ACO LEAD Model
products.description: Participation in CMS ACO Long-term Enhanced ACO Design Model for advanced value-based care.

products.name: Management Services Organization (MSO)
products.description: Administrative and management services provided to affiliated physician groups and IPAs.

products.name: Independent Practice Association (IPA)
products.description: Physician network management and capitation-based care coordination services.

partnerships.description: Affiliated healthcare organization referenced in company glossary.
MSO entity affiliated with the company's operations.
Includes Golden Triangle Physician Alliance and Heritage Physician Networks, referenced as CHS.
Affiliated medical group referenced in company operations.
